system.description:
Picks mechanical locks with thieves' tools. Hastily: 1 round; natural 1–3 jams the lock permanently; a failed hasty attempt cannot be repeated until the next level. Methodically: 1 turn, +4 bonus, repeatable; jams only on natural 1.

Auto-scales with the owner's class level in party rolls (RR p. 31): L1: 18+ · L2: 17+ · L3: 16+ · L4: 15+ · L5: 14+ · L6: 13+ · L7: 11+ · L8: 9+ · L9: 7+ · L10: 5+ · L11: 3+ · L12: 1+ · L13: -1+ · L14: -3+. For a class using the skill at half level, set the module's levelFactor flag to 0.5.
